Activation — click a band

ActiveLearningDormant / new

Remembered answers

Hebrew text & morphology from the ETCBC BHSA dataset, via Text-Fabric.

Settings

Presets
Saved setups
Learning modes
Show all cards at once (typed worksheet)
Pick one or more — rounds shuffle between them. Typed checks what you write; Self-rate reveals the answer and you grade yourself (space, then 1·2·3); Match is a drag-or-tap pairing game.
Study unit
Parsing needs word forms — clear the grammar categories to drill lexemes.
Forms shows attested inflections (מַלְכֵי, אָרֶץ…); choosing any parse category forces forms.
Hebrew keyboard layout
Show the on-screen keyboard
Type on your physical keyboard; the on-screen board is a fallback. Phonetic is approximate, Israeli is the standard layout.
Vocalisation
Check vowel-points in answers
Show vowel-points on the prompt
Languages in play
Drag or tap a label into the frame. A source word asks for its gloss; the gloss asks for the word(s).
Ask for gloss
On
Parse — grammatical categories
Drag in the categories to be quizzed. Each is asked only when it applies to the form shown.
Word classes
Include proper names (יהוה, place & personal names)
Book
Limit the drill to forms attested in one book (e.g. read your way through Jonah).
Frequency band
Drill only words whose count falls in this band — set a low ceiling to skip the words you already know.
Words per round
Vocabulary
About

Type Hebrew on your physical keyboard (or the on-screen board). Answers check on consonants unless you turn on vowel-points. Forms mode surfaces attested inflections — construct, pausal, and the rest. Grammar is read from the data, so only categories a form actually carries are asked. Marking an unrecognised gloss as right remembers it; manage those under Progress.

Influenced by ch-jensen/Vocab — Vocabulary training for Biblical Hebrew and Aramaic (Højgaard), and codykingham/Mahir — Contextual Vocabulary Acquisition for Readers of Literature (Cody Kingham).

Progress isn't saved in this preview — open the downloaded file on your computer to keep it.
נֶפֶשׁ — esc

Report or suggest

Found a wrong gloss or parse, hit a bug, or want a feature? Send it straight to me.
